name: Chief Sidekick
desc2: Equip to increase Stun Agents' combat capabilities
phaseDescs: The equipper's Impact increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>30</ct>, and their DMG ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>15%</ct> of the target's <ct color=#FF5521>Fire RES</ct>. When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.4</ct>/s. When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>12.5%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Impact increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>33</ct>, and their DMG ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>17.2%</ct> of the target's <ct color=#FF5521>Fire RES</ct>. When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.46</ct>/s. When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>14.4%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.52</ct>/s. When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>16.3%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>18.1%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.

The equipper's Impact increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>42</ct>, and their DMG ignores <ct color=#2BAD00>24%</ct> of the target's <ct color=#FF5521>Fire RES</ct>. When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>0.64</ct>/s. When the equipper deals <ct color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</ct> with an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, all Agents' DMG increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>20%</ct> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times.
